business.name: Rapid Electricians Columbus
business.tagline: Fast, reliable electrical work when you need it

hero.headline: *Rapid* means we're there today
hero.subheadline: No waiting weeks for an estimate. No leaving you in the dark. Just fast, clean electrical work that gets the job done right.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Wire, Switch, and Outlet
services_section.subheading: From simple fixture swaps to complete outdoor installations — we handle it all

services.title: Light Installation & Fixtures
services.description: New ceiling fans, pendant lights, chandeliers — whatever brightens your space. Clean installation with energy-saving recommendations.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Installation
services.description: Adding outlets where you need them most. GFCI protection, USB outlets, smart switches — all installed neat and functional.

services.title: Outdoor & Hot Tub Wiring
services.description: Weatherproof connections for hot tubs, outdoor lighting, and pool equipment. Proper conduit runs and code-compliant installations.

services.title: Electrical Panel Work
services.description: Circuit additions, breaker upgrades, and panel replacements. We make sure your home has the power it needs, safely.

about.heading: Columbus Electrical Work Done Right
about.body: We're the electricians Columbus calls when speed matters but quality can't be compromised. Licensed, insured, and answering calls seven days a week. Every job gets the same attention — whether it's one outlet or rewiring your whole house. Clean work, fair prices, no surprises.

reviews.name: Karen J.
reviews.text: They installed new lights throughout our house — the electrician was knowledgeable and fast. Everything looks perfect and works great.

reviews.name: Shawn J.
reviews.text: Punctual team that worked clean and gave excellent advice on energy-saving lighting options. Highly recommend their service!

reviews.name: Jennifer S.
reviews.text: Hot tub installation required outdoor wiring — they ran everything safely, weatherproofed all connections, and kept me informed throughout. Stress-free experience.

reviews.name: Michelle B.
reviews.text: Experienced, trustworthy electrician who did effective work. Very satisfied with the results.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across central Ohio

cta.heading: Ready for Fast, Professional Electrical Work?
cta.body: Don't wait weeks for service. Call now for same-day estimates and quick turnaround on all electrical projects.
